J:\CODE\arm-gnu-toolchain\bin\arm-none-eabi-g++.exe  -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mfloat-abi=soft -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-common -Wall -Wextra -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-threadsafe-statics -O2 -g -T J:/PROJECT/auroraOS/config/linker.ld -nostartfiles -nostdlib --specs=nosys.specs CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/boot/boot.S.obj CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/boot/uart.c.obj CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/boot/interrupts.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/kernel/memory.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/kernel/libc.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/auroraOS.elf.dir/vfs/vfs.cpp.obj
